2604.07659.title: Efficient and Effective Internal Memory Retrieval for LLM-Based Healthcare Prediction
2604.07659.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) hold significant promise for healthcare, yet their reliability in high-stakes clinical settings is often compromised by hallucinations and a lack of granular medical context. While Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) can mitigate these issues, standard supervised pipelines require computationally intensive searches over massive external knowledge bases, leading to high latency that is impractical for time-sensitive care. To address this, we introduce Keys to Knowledge (K2K), a novel framework that replaces external retrieval with internal, key-based knowledge access. By encoding essential clinical information directly into the model's parameter space, K2K enables rapid retrieval from internal key-value memory without inference-time overhead. We further enhance retrieval quality through activation-guided probe construction and cross-attention reranking. Experimental results demonstrate that K2K achieves state-of-the-art performance across four benchmark healthcare outcome prediction datasets.
2604.07659.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在醫療保健領域具有重要潛力，但它們在高風險臨床環境中的可靠性常常受到幻覺和缺乏細緻醫學背景的影響。雖然檢索增強生成（RAG）可以緩解這些問題，但標準的監督管道需要對龐大的外部知識庫進行計算密集型搜索，導致高延遲，這對於時間敏感的護理來說是不切實際的。為了解決這個問題，我們引入了知識鑰匙（K2K），這是一個新穎的框架，將外部檢索替換為基於內部鍵的知識訪問。通過將基本臨床信息直接編碼到模型的參數空間中，K2K 能夠在不增加推理時間開銷的情況下，快速從內部鍵值記憶中檢索。我們進一步通過激活引導探針構建和交叉注意力重排序來提高檢索質量。實驗結果表明，K2K 在四個基準醫療結果預測數據集上達到了最先進的性能。
2604.07659.author: Mingchen Li et.al.
2604.07659.authors: Mingchen Li, Jiatan Huang, Zonghai Yao, Hong yu
